testsuite.name: SearchViewModel

testcase.name: initial state is idle with a blank query and no results
onQueryChange with a blank string sets isIdle = true
onQueryChange with non-blank query sets isIdle = false
rapid typing within the window fires only one search for the final query
successful search populates results and clears isSearching
use-case IS invoked after 200 ms have elapsed since the last keystroke
use-case is NOT invoked before the 200 ms debounce window has elapsed
failed search sets errorMessage and clears isSearching
a query shorter than 2 characters is never forwarded to the use-case
isSearching transitions to true while the network request is in flight
clearSearch resets all state to its initial defaults
onQueryChange reflects the new query in uiState immediately
empty results from the use-case are reflected in the results list
a new query cancels the previous in-flight request before it completes

testsuite.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/soliman/.gradle/caches/modules-2/files-2.1/net.bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.14.17/e3c251a39dc90badaf71c83427ba46840f219d8d/byte-buddy-agent-1.14.17.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
